scriptLines: SourceAdvisor derive(ExperienceBand = case(   toInteger(experience_years) >= 15, 'Senior',   toInteger(experience_years) >= 8, 'Mid-Level',   toInteger(experience_years) >= 3, 'Junior',   'Trainee' )) ~> ExperienceBand

FlowDirection = case(   upper(Type) == 'DEPOSIT', 'Inflow',   upper(Type) == 'INTEREST', 'Inflow',   upper(Type) == 'DIVIDEND', 'Inflow',   upper(Type) == 'WITHDRAWAL', 'Outflow',   'Neutral' )) ~> DerivedCashflows
